expectations.text: Recommends a hook (not a skill) for automatic file-read logging
expectations.evidence: Response opens with 'You need a HOOK, not a skill.' — unambiguous

expectations.text: Explains why a hook is better than a skill for this use case
expectations.evidence: Explains skills require user invocation vs hooks are lifecycle-driven; includes 'Why not a skill?' section

expectations.text: Specifies PostToolUse as the correct hook event
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'PostToolUse hook matching the Read tool' with three-point justification

expectations.text: Provides a concrete hook shell script or template
